objective: Make every claimed training improvement causally attributable to a versioned knowledge release and a versioned prediction-method release that were actually consumed by an answer-isolated ChatGPT reasoning session.

current_diagnosis.historical_baseline: The original project-upload S00-S19 and repository R16 baseline were byte-identical at migration time.
current_diagnosis.critical_gap: The installed CHAT/WORK adapter validates predictions after reasoning but does not deliver repository source text into the reasoning session or prove causal use.
current_diagnosis.consequence: Repository-only modifications cannot yet be credited as learned knowledge or prediction improvement.

contains: case inputs supplied by the user
must_not_contain_after_cutover: prior revealed-case rationale available to blind runs

github_repository.role: Sole mutable authority for knowledge, method, research hypotheses, runtime state and audit

model_release.definition: One immutable tuple of bootstrap prompt ID, knowledge release, method release, code commit and source-delivery schema.

answer_vault.role: Physically separate grading authority after complete prediction freeze

mandatory_components.purpose: Keep history immutable while allowing the active knowledge model to advance.
mandatory_components.acceptance: A new release can differ from R16 without overwriting R16, and every file is hash-bound.

mandatory_components.purpose: Move mutable prediction workflow out of permanently static project instructions.
deliverables: literal option and pairwise adjudication rules
mandatory_components.acceptance: A run proves the exact method release used; method changes do not require rewriting historical predictions.

mandatory_components.purpose: Causally deliver the exact repository knowledge release into ChatGPT reasoning.
deliverables: parent-clause text with conditions, negations, exceptions and limitations
mandatory_components.acceptance: Every evidence-ledger entry resolves to an exact packet item and repository file hash.

mandatory_components.purpose: Deliver the exact prediction procedure together with the source packet.
mandatory_components.acceptance: The ChatGPT session receives one complete immutable run contract before reasoning begins.

mandatory_components.purpose: Reject declared bindings that were not actually used.
deliverables: packet-item references on every knowledge call
method-rule references on every mandatory stage
mandatory_components.acceptance: Any project-upload citation, unbound excerpt or missing method stage fails closed and cannot be scored.

mandatory_components.purpose: Convert review findings into either program fixes, source candidates or research hypotheses.
mandatory_components.acceptance: No revealed answer letter, option position or case-specific winner phrase enters a candidate release.

stages: same-set clean retest with revised MODEL_RELEASE
repeat source/method revision until target or unresolved limit
new unseen frozen block after same-set target
mandatory_components.acceptance: TOP1/TOP2 are calculated only from answer-isolated frozen predictions; retrospective explanations never count as accuracy.
A clean run can complete using repository packets only, with explicit proof that project-upload knowledge was absent or unused.

implementation_order: P0 Freeze current claims and preserve R16/project state as archive
P1 Implement knowledge and method release versioning
P2 Materialize chunked source catalog and SOURCE-PACKET-BUILDER-V1
P3 Implement immutable MODEL_RELEASE and run contract
P4 Implement causal-use and mixed-source validators
P5 Run byte-identical R16 repository-only shadow validation
P6 Compile the five-case review into R21/R22 candidate source, method and hypothesis changes
P7 Build complete revised MODEL_RELEASE candidate
P8 Run clean same-set 25-question retest and freeze before grading
P9 Iterate until the declared target or document unresolved limits
P10 Run a new unseen frozen block
P11 Promote release and create the clean repository-only ChatGPT project

now: Do not delete the current project S00-S19 files yet.
Do not manually maintain two changing copies.
Do not treat further case scores as valid until repository source delivery is installed.
later_once_cutover_is_proven: Create or switch to the new clean project with the minimal bootstrap prompt and GitHub connection.
Keep the old project read-only as an archive rather than deleting it.

next_engineering_action: Implement C01-C05 first; do not start the 25-question clean retest before their end-to-end shadow validation passes.
